SELECT 
    rct.trx_number AS "Invoice Number",
    rct.trx_date AS "Invoice Date",
    hca.account_number AS "Customer Number",
    hp.party_name AS "Customer Name",
    rct.invoice_currency_code AS "Currency",
    arps.amount_due_original AS "Original Amount",
    arps.amount_due_remaining AS "Outstanding Amount",
    arps.due_date AS "Due Date",
    TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) AS "Days Overdue"
FROM RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL rct
JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS_ hca ON rct.bill_to_customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
JOIN HZ_PARTIES hp ON hca.party_id = hp.party_id
JOIN AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL arps ON rct.customer_trx_id = arps.customer_trx_id
WHERE arps.amount_due_remaining > 0
  AND rct.complete_flag = 'Y'
ORDER BY arps.due_date ASC

SELECT 
    hp.party_name AS "Customer",
    hca.account_number AS "Customer Number",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) <= 30 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "0-30 Days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "31-60 Days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "61-90 Days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) > 90 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "Over 90 Days",
    SUM(arps.amount_due_remaining) AS "Total Outstanding"
FROM RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL rct
JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS_ hca ON rct.bill_to_customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
JOIN HZ_PARTIES hp ON hca.party_id = hp.party_id
JOIN AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL arps ON rct.customer_trx_id = arps.customer_trx_id
WHERE arps.amount_due_remaining > 0
  AND rct.complete_flag = 'Y'
GROUP BY hp.party_name, hca.account_number
ORDER BY hp.party_name

SELECT 
    gcc.concatenated_segments AS "Account",
    gcc.segment1 AS "Company",
    gcc.segment2 AS "Department",
    gcc.segment3 AS "Account Number",
    glb.period_name AS "Period",
    glb.begin_balance_dr AS "Beginning Debit",
    glb.begin_balance_cr AS "Beginning Credit",
    glb.period_net_dr AS "Period Debit",
    glb.period_net_cr AS "Period Credit",
    (NVL(glb.begin_balance_dr, 0) - NVL(glb.begin_balance_cr, 0) + 
     NVL(glb.period_net_dr, 0) - NVL(glb.period_net_cr, 0)) AS "Ending Balance"
FROM GL_BALANCES glb
JOIN GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS gcc ON glb.code_combination_id = gcc.code_combination_id
WHERE glb.period_name = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'MON-YY')
  AND glb.currency_code = 'USD'
ORDER BY gcc.concatenated_segments

    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "31-60 Days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "61-90 Days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) > 90 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "Over 90 Days",
    SUM(arps.amount_due_remaining) AS "Total Outstanding"
FROM RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL rct
JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS_ hca ON rct.bill_to_customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
JOIN HZ_PARTIES hp ON hca.party_id = hp.party_id
JOIN AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL arps ON rct.customer_trx_id = arps.customer_trx_id
WHERE arps.amount_due_remaining > 0
  AND rct.complete_flag = 'Y'
GROUP BY hp.party_name, hca.account_number
ORDER BY hp.party_name

SELECT 
    hp.party_name AS "Customer",
    hca.account_number AS "Customer Number",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) <= 30 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "0-30 Days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "31-60 Days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "61-90 Days",
    SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(SYSDATE - arps.due_date) > 90 THEN arps.amount_due_remaining ELSE 0 END) AS "Over 90 Days",
    SUM(arps.amount_due_remaining) AS "Total Outstanding"
FROM RA_CUSTOMER_TRX_ALL rct
JOIN HZ_CUST_ACCOUNTS_ hca ON rct.bill_to_customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
JOIN HZ_PARTIES hp ON hca.party_id = hp.party_id
JOIN AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL arps ON rct.customer_trx_id = arps.customer_trx_id
WHERE arps.amount_due_remaining > 0
  AND rct.complete_flag = 'Y'
GROUP BY hp.party_name, hca.account_number
ORDER BY hp.party_name

SELECT
api.INVOICE_ID InvoiceID,
api.VENDOR_ID VendorID,
api.INVOICE_NUM InvoiceNumber,
api.INVOICE_AMOUNT InvoiceAmount,
api.VENDOR_SITE_ID VenderSiteID,
api.AMOUNT_PAID AmountPaid,
api.INVOICE_DATE InvoiceDate,
api.Source Source,
api.INVOICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE InvoiceType,
api.DESCRIPTION Description,
api.PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG PaymentStatusFlag,
api.GL_DATE GLPostingDate,
api.TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT TaxAmount,
api.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID LegalEntityID,
party.party_name PartyName,
siteParty.party_name SitePartyName,
api.party_site_id
,cc.segment1 segment1
,cc.segment4 segment4
,entity.name EntityName
,api.PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE
FROM 
AP_INVOICES_ALL api
left join hz_parties party on party.party_id =  api.party_id 
left join hz_parties siteParty on siteParty.IDEN_ADDR_PARTY_SITE_ID = api.party_site_id
left join gl_code_combinations cc on cc.code_combination_id = api.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
left join XLE_ENTITY_PROFILES entity on entity.legal_entity_id = api.legal_entity_id

where 
(cc.SEGMENT1  IN (:P_Company) or 'All' IN (:P_Company || 'All'))
and (Source IN (:P_Source) or 'All' IN (:P_Source|| 'All'))
and (api.PAYMENT_CURRENCY_CODE IN (:P_Currency) or 'All' IN (:P_Currency|| 'All'))

AND api.PAYMENT_STATUS_FLAG = 'Y'
